comment: NestJS 10 has hard compiler requirements that diverge from the strict shared base: DI needs emitDecoratorMetadata + value (non-type-only) imports, so verbatimModuleSyntax/isolatedModules are off here. ESM (NodeNext) is kept so this service can import the ESM-only @migrationtower/contracts and /db on Node 20. Documented framework deviation, not a convenience relaxation (see CLAUDE.md).
